description: Local hydration layer joining git, gh, and Claude Code sessions into one JSON + MCP surface. Installs as a per-user logon task on 127.0.0.1:7887.
post_install: # Register a per-user logon task so repo-recall runs in Kai's session
# (full PATH + gh/git creds + X: drive). Per-user task = no admin needed.
# Native binds 7887 so it never collides with a WSL instance on the default 7777.
Write-Host 'repo-recall: logon task registered + started on http://127.0.0.1:7887' -ForegroundColor Green
notes: repo-recall runs as a per-user logon task (Task Scheduler), not a Windows service - no admin or password required, and it runs in your session so gh/git credentials and the X: drive resolve.
Native instance binds 127.0.0.1:7887 (REPO_RECALL_PORT). The default 7777 is left free for a WSL instance. Check it with: curl http://127.0.0.1:7887/api/scan-version
Manage the task: Get-ScheduledTask repo-recall | Start-ScheduledTask / Stop-ScheduledTask.
version/hash above are placeholders - 'scoop update repo-recall' fills them from the published .sha256 sidecar after the first Forgejo release.
